allow: Bash(powershell -command "Get-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName HypervisorPlatform | Select-Object State; Get-WindowsOptionalFeature -Online -FeatureName Microsoft-Hyper-V-All | Select-Object State")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Select-Object Name | Sort-Object Name | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "java|studio|emul|qemu|pixel|avd" })

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\Home\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; $timeout = 300; $start = Get-Date; while \(\(Get-Date\) - $start -lt [TimeSpan]::FromSeconds\($timeout\)\) { $result = & $adb devices; if \($result -match "emulator"\) { Write-Host "EMULATOR ONLINE: $result"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "Waiting... $\([int]\(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalSeconds\)s" }; Write-Host "Done")
Bash(git commit -m 'Add real YouTube video playback and Add Video feature *)
